title: From format corrections to a constraint-aware setup
summary: A user corrected the assistant for adding markdown around JSON and for deciding too quickly. The case study turns those corrections into tests, then checks whether a constraint-aware setup better preserves exact asks and decision agency.
privacy: Uses public-safe synthetic conversation exports and captured local outputs. No hosted API is required.
workflow: Mine corrections about formatting and decision support.
Approve one development case and one final-check case.
Score captured baseline and candidate outputs.
Gate the candidate before recommending review.
expectedTakeaway: A setup can be capable but still create cleanup work. Exact formatting and decision agency are testable personal-fit behaviors.
